result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 5:     AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mont...
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH cases_4m AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%%owner%%') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN cases_4m c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
not_transferred AS (
  SELECT c.*
  FROM cases_4m c
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.case_id = c.id
  WHERE COALESCE(a.owner_change_cnt,0) <= 1
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt
  FROM cases_4m
  GROUP BY ownerid
),
agent_aht AS (
  SELECT nt.ownerid AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred nt
  GROUP BY nt.ownerid
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE c.case_cnt > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH cases_4m AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN cases_4m c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
not_transferred AS (
  SELECT c.*
  FROM cases_4m c
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.case_id = c.id
  WHERE COALESCE(a.owner_change_cnt,0) <= 1
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt
  FROM cases_4m
  GROUP BY ownerid
),
agent_aht AS (
  SELECT nt.ownerid AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred nt
  GROUP BY nt.ownerid
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE c.case_cnt > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH cases_4m AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN cases_4m c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
not_transferred AS (
  SELECT c.*
  FROM cases_4m c
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.case_id = c.id
  WHERE COALESCE(a.owner_change_cnt,0) <= 1
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt
  FROM cases_4m
  GROUP BY ownerid
),
agent_aht AS (
  SELECT nt.ownerid AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred nt
  GROUP BY nt.ownerid
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE c.case_cnt > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH cases_4m AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN cases_4m c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
not_transferred AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.created_ts, c.closed_ts
  FROM cases_4m c
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.case_id = c.id
  WHERE COALESCE(a.owner_change_cnt,0) <= 1
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt
  FROM cases_4m
  GROUP BY ownerid
),
agent_aht AS (
  SELECT nt.ownerid AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closed_ts - nt.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred nt
  GROUP BY nt.ownerid
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE c.case_cnt > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;
